recentArticles.title: Peach PRC Releases Debut Album ‘Porcelain’, Shares New Video for ‘Hold It for Her’ - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Peach PRC Releases Debut Album ‘Porcelain’, Shares New Video for ‘Hold It for Her’. Peach PRC has released her debut album *Porcelain*, marking a major milestone for the Australian pop artist following the breakout success of her earlier releases. Arriving April 3, the full-length project introduces a more expansive body of work from the singer-songwriter, who first gained widespread attention with her 2023 EP *Manic Dream Pixie*. That release debuted at No. 1 on the ARIA Albums Chart and helped establish Peach PRC as a rising voice in alt-pop, with a growing global streaming audience. ### Jack White, Anne Hathaway & More: Which Is Your Favorite New Music Release This Week? The album’s release is accompanied by a new single, “Hold It for Her,” alongside an official music video directed by Tom Carroll. The album builds on Peach PRC’s signature blend of diaristic lyricism and polished pop production, while expanding her sonic palette with electronic influences.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導澳洲流行歌手Peach PRC發行首張專輯《Porcelain》，並分享新歌《Hold It for Her》的音樂錄影帶，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: ‘Nobody would forgive me if I told the truth’: new film about pacifist turned Nazi collaborator divides France - The Guardian
recentArticles.snippet: Xavier Giannoli’s new film Les Rayons et les Ombres (Rays and Shadows) is told from the postwar perspective of Corinne Luchaire, a French actor who was once hailed as “the new Garbo” but grew too close to the Nazis during the German occupation years. “I wanted to make this film to show all the traps that a human being can fall into,” says Giannoli, who spent five years developing the script with screenwriters Jacques Fieschi and Yves Stavrides. In the film, Jean Luchaire is played by Oscar-winner Jean Dujardin (The Artist), and Giannoli says casting a popular actor in the role was essential to his vision of a “seductive” betrayal. “There is no Jean Luchaire without Otto Abetz,” notes Giannoli. While commending Giannoli’s film for its “blur” and “ambiguity,” Laurent Joly, a leading French historian of the Vichy regime and state antisemitism, is dubitative about its depiction of Jean Luchaire.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要報導一部關於二戰期間法國納粹合作者的法國新電影。

recentArticles.title: Munki explores growth and self-discovery on new track “Far Away” - EARMILK
recentArticles.snippet: # Munki explores growth and self-discovery on new track “Far Away”. **Munki**’s “Far Away” feels like a defining step into the spotlight for the UK multi-instrumentalist, marking a confident shift from collaborator to solo storyteller. As the second single from his upcoming EP, *Four Leaf Clover*, the track carries a sense of movement both literal and emotional, built around themes of self-discovery and independence. Lyrics like “Far away I will wander / Further I will roam” establish a journey without a fixed destination, mirroring the uncertainty that often accompanies personal growth. What works particularly well is how the track balances reflection with a sense of optimism. #### Sahvvv aims to impress on her dark and atmospheric debut single 'Dangerous'. ## Hallie Marie mourns a whirlwind romance on new single "A Space of Clarity". ## Satya reflects during dark moments in recent single "Project 10". ## Jordan Renzi releases new single "Edge of the Sea" ahead of new album.

recentArticles.title: Raye tops album charts with This Music May Contain Hope - BBC
recentArticles.snippet: # Raye tops album charts with This Music May Contain Hope. Award-winning singer-songwriter Raye has topped the album charts for the first time with This Music May Contain Hope. The album, which she released last week, is her second number one this year following the hugely successful single, Where the Hell is My Husband - which she debuted at Glastonbury last summer and is now approaching its billionth stream on Spotify. Olivia Dean's The Art of Loving is at number two in the album chart, while US rapper Kanye West, now known as Ye, is at number three with his new release Bully. Meanwhile, their album, Arirang, is at number four in the album chart. Her previous album, 2023's My 21st Century Blues, debuted at number two in the charts. ## Raye comes out swinging on her new album, This Music May Contain Hope. ## Harry Styles breaks his own sales record as new album hits number one.

recentArticles.title: Tiffany Young Signs 360 Deal With Pacific Music Group Ahead of New Music - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Tiffany Young Signs 360 Deal With Pacific Music Group Ahead of New Music. With Tiffany Young approaching nearly two decades in entertainment — and just ahead of her 10th anniversary since debuting as a solo artist — the singer-songwriter-actress has signed with the quickly growing Pacific Music Group ahead of her upcoming music releases. The signing formally launches the Korean roster for the new globally-focused Pan-Asian music and entertainment company founded by Ne-Yo, MC Jin, Indian singer-actor Sonu Nigam and former Warner Music Asia president **Jonathan Serbin**. ### Timbaland’s AI Artist TaTa Signs to Pacific Music Group. While Pacific Music Group is headquartered in Hong Kong, it has expanded its Seoul operations with 12 new hires — including the newly announced Korea exec **Samuel Ku** — to support artist management, creative development, marketing and global coordination. ### Tiffany Young Signs 360 Deal With Pacific Music Group Ahead of New Music.

One of his athletes won an NCAA title in platform diving on Saturday. * Share Days After NCAA Platform Title, Texas A&M Diving Coach Jay Lerew Is Out on Facebook. * Tweet Days After NCAA Platform Title, Texas A&M Diving Coach Jay Lerew Is Out. * Submit Days After NCAA Platform Title, Texas A&M Diving Coach Jay Lerew Is Out to Reddit. * Share Days After NCAA Platform Title, Texas A&M Diving Coach Jay Lerew Is Out on Pinterest. * Share Days After NCAA Platform Title, Texas A&M Diving Coach Jay Lerew Is Out on LinkedIn. Texas A&M has parted ways with head diving coach **Jay Lerew** just days after one of his athletes won an NCAA Championship. * Days After NCAA Platform Title, Texas A&M Diving Coach Jay Lerew Is Out.

recentArticles.title: U2 Share Another Surprise New EP 'Easter Lily' - Stereogum
recentArticles.snippet: # U2 Share Another Surprise New EP, *Easter Lily*. *U2 - Easter Lily* contains six songs, the last of which has a new soundscape by Brian Eno. Here's what Bono says about the release:. These are for sure "wilderness years" for so many of us looking at the mayhem out there in the world. > It’s a time that has our band digging deeper into our lives to find a wellspring of songs to try meet the moment… With *Easter Lily* we ended up asking very personal questions like: Are our own relationships up to these challenging times? Like *Days Of Ash*, *U2 - Easter Lily* comes with a digital version of their *Propaganda* zine with contributions from the four band members. The first track, "Song for Hal," pays tribute to Hall Willner, with whom U2 worked on several projects; the late tribute album producer would've turned 70 on Easter Monday. ### Yambag Release Fast, Nasty New Eight-Song, Eight-Minute EP *The Psycho*.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於U2樂團發行新EP《Easter Lily》的資訊，內容與周杰倫無關。

latestReport.daily_summary: 周杰倫「嘉年華II」巡演杭州站盛大開唱，首度獻唱7首新歌，並動用14公尺巨型機甲，吸引5萬歌迷狂歡。他公開了在英國古堡向昆凌求婚的珍貴影片，單膝下跪的畫面引發熱議。此外，Spotify也推出周杰倫專屬「16包廂」互動體驗，成功吸引三倍新粉絲加入。

recentReports.daily_summary: 周杰倫「嘉年華II」巡演杭州站盛大開唱，首度獻唱7首新歌，並動用14公尺巨型機甲，吸引5萬歌迷狂歡。他公開了在英國古堡向昆凌求婚的珍貴影片，單膝下跪的畫面引發熱議。此外，Spotify也推出周杰倫專屬「16包廂」互動體驗，成功吸引三倍新粉絲加入。
今日周杰倫新聞焦點：他公開了在英國古堡向昆凌求婚的感人影片，引發熱議。同時，「嘉年華II」世界巡演於杭州盛大啟動，現場5萬名歌迷狂嗨，更出動14公尺巨型機甲。此外，Spotify推出周杰倫專屬互動體驗「16包廂」，成功吸引三倍新粉絲加入。
今日搜集到的新聞中，沒有直接關於周杰倫的報導。主要焦點集中在其他娛樂、體育及商業新聞，例如MGK慶祝女兒生日、Jaafar Jackson分享對麥可傑克森的回憶，以及Kanye West專輯的討論等。周杰倫今日未有新的公開活動或重大新聞發布。
今日搜集到的新聞內容，經仔細審閱後，並未發現任何與華語天王周杰倫直接相關的報導或動態。所有新聞焦點均集中於國際娛樂圈、體育賽事、政治動態及其他社會議題，周杰倫今日並無公開或被報導的活動。
